data.name: Timestamps: Lost Love
data.detailed_description:
This is the second chapter of the Timestamps Visual Novel series where the adventure continues and concludes.

In this installment of Timestamps: Lost Love, you are thrown back into the adventure. How much of the timeline has been messed with? You need to travel to an unknown time, to really understand the present. Crazy things are happening in town as of late, and now someone close to you is missing. What's going to happen next?

You live in Cougar Valley surrounded by incredibly beautiful women. You will have to make decisions to reveal the secrets of your closest friends, and to discover the darker and more playful side of the valley's finest women. More things are going on than meets the eye. Who is playing both sides? Who are those mysterious men behind the curtains? This world is yours to discover.

Do you have what it takes to be immersed into a world full of sex, mystery and suspense?

Timestamps: Lost Love is an adult Visual Novel featuring:

  • Continuation from Timestamps: Unconditional Love

  • Plenty of very explicit content.

  • Over 8500 High Quality images and more than 320 animations.

  • Fully optional smoking elements.

  • Around 15+ hours of gameplay.

  • Mood-fitting music tracks and sound effects.

  • Plenty of fun references and easter eggs.

  • Comedy, Sci-fi and a darker deep story. There is more than meets the eye.

This is the second chapter of the Timestamps Series, Lost Love which was completed in 2024. Timestamps is a popular series of Adult Visual Novel Games developed by a very small indie team as a passion project for the last few years.

data.short_description: An exciting adult Visual Novel with a unique intriguing story featuring Sci-Fi, Time Travel, Romance, Sex, Humor, Character Development and some fun references.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: High Sierra
  • 處理器: Universal (Apple Silicon & Intel)
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mojave
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 15
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
